title: Beef Canadian Wrap
description: A mexican-inspired beef wrap filled with comforting and savory flavors. Served with a side of fresh cilantro.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of avocado oil and cook the beef until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the salsa to the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the tortilla wraps in the microwave or in a dry skillet.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the beef mixture onto a tortilla and topping with cilantro, cheese, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
